---
title: "Rowing Intro"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(readr)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
crew2k <- read_csv("keelinjoyce/rowing/crew2k.csv")
crew6k <- read_csv("keelinjoyce/rowing/crew6k.csv")
```

## 6k change

```{r}
ggplot(data = crew6k, aes(x = Goal, y = Split)) +
  geom_point()

crew6k <- crew6k |> filter(Date == "6-Feb" | Date == "27-Feb") |> 
  mutate(Piece = factor(Piece)) |>
  group_by(ID) |>
  mutate(n = n()) |>
  filter(n == 2)

crew6k_goals <- crew6k |> mutate(Diff = as.numeric((Split - Goal)/ 60)) |>
  mutate(Change = case_when(Diff > 0 ~ "overachieved",
                            Diff < 0 ~ "underachieved",
                            Diff == 0 ~ "met goal")) |>
  ungroup() |>
  count(Change)

ggplot(data = crew6k_goals, aes(x = Change, y = Split)) +
  geom_violin()
```

## 2k change

```{r}
crew2k_work <- crew2k |> 
  filter(Date == "17-Mar" | Date == "12-Feb" | Date == "16-Feb" | Date == "18-Mar") |> 
  group_by(ID) |>
  mutate(n = n()) |>
  filter(n == 2) |>
  mutate(test = if_else(Date == "12-Feb" | Date == "16-Feb",
                          true = "first",
                          false = "second"))|>
  mutate(Time = factor(Time))

ggplot(data = crew2k_work, aes(x = test, y = Split)) +
  geom_point(aes(colour = Sex)) 


crew2k_goals <- crew2k |> mutate(Diff = as.numeric((Split - Goal)/ 60)) |>
  mutate(Change = case_when(Diff > 0 ~ "overachieved",
                            Diff < 0 ~ "underachieved",
                            Diff == 0 ~ "met goal")) |>
  group_by(Change) |>
  summarise(n())
## 32 overachieved out of 71
prop.test(x = 32, n = 71, p = 0.5, 
                 correct = FALSE)

ggplot(data = crew2k_goals, aes(x = Change, y = Split)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2)
```
